UserProfilePublic.title: Public Profile
UserProfilePublic.description: Public educational scores, unlocked levels, and badging information.

userId.description: The unique Firebase Auth UID of the user.

displayName.description: The name selected by the user for the leaderboard.

unlockedLevel.description: The highest unlocked topic index (0: Limits, 1: Derivatives, 2: Integrals).

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when progress was last updated.

UserProfilePrivate.title: Private Information
UserProfilePrivate.description: Private student data containing personally identifiable information (PII).

/users/{userId}.description: Publicly accessible profile used for Leaderboard and basic progress sharing.

/usersPrivate/{userId}.description: Private configuration storing securely isolated email addresses to conform to privacy criteria.
